stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
A pilot is plotting a track from Hohenfels NDB (N49°13' E011°52'). The dead reckoning (DR) position is N49°00'E 13°08'. Given the following data, what is the true bearing that should be plotted from the NDB to the aircraft (QTE), corrected for all relevant factors?

Compass heading: 005°C
Deviation: 3° East
Constant of the cone: 0.82
Relative bearing on your omni bearing indicator: 255°
